Event: Magic Well - August 2024
Event Date: 18/08/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A206


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Junk Chest
Mineral Acorn Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Lethal Ball
Launces a ball at the enemy with the highest current health. The ball bounces 3 times. One of the following effect is triggered when the ball hits the target, based on the target's health:
- If the target has 50% or more health, the ball deals 300000 pure damage.
- If the target has 50% or less health, it explodes and deals pure damage equal to 10% of the target's max health to itself and all enemies in a small radius around it.

Requirements: 90-100
